assertion_results.text: Step 8 Case A creates standard remediation tasks for the current stream (rhtpa-2.2) with standard labels ['ai-generated-jira', 'Security', 'CVE-2026-55123'] and 'Depend' link to TC-8020
assertion_results.evidence: remediation.md lines 12-13: "Case A: Remediation Tasks for Stream rhtpa-2.2 (In-Scope)". Line 18: Labels: `ai-generated-jira`, `Security`, `CVE-2026-55123`. Lines 82-86: jira.create_link with type: "Depend" from TC-8020. Line 91 shows downstream task also has same standard labels. Lines 155-159: downstream also linked to TC-8020 with type: "Depend".

assertion_results.text: Step 8 Case B detects that stream rhtpa-2.1 is also affected but has no CVE Jira — creates proactive preemptive remediation tasks (§1.60)
assertion_results.evidence: remediation.md lines 164-168: "Case B: Preemptive Remediation Tasks for Stream rhtpa-2.1 (Cross-Stream) -- Stream rhtpa-2.1 is affected (tokio 1.40.0 < 1.42.0) but has no CVE Jira. Preemptive remediation tasks are created." cross-stream.md lines 23-24: "Since no CVE Jira exists for stream rhtpa-2.1, preemptive remediation tasks are created per Case B."

assertion_results.text: Preemptive tasks for stream rhtpa-2.1 include the 'security-preemptive' label alongside standard labels: ['ai-generated-jira', 'Security', 'CVE-2026-55123', 'security-preemptive']
assertion_results.evidence: remediation.md line 174: preemptive upstream task labels: `ai-generated-jira`, `Security`, `CVE-2026-55123`, `security-preemptive`. Line 252: preemptive downstream task labels: `ai-generated-jira`, `Security`, `CVE-2026-55123`, `security-preemptive`. cross-stream.md lines 33-35 table confirms same label set.

assertion_results.text: Preemptive tasks are linked to the originating CVE Jira TC-8020 with 'Related' link type (not 'Depend') because the originating CVE belongs to a different stream
assertion_results.evidence: remediation.md lines 241-243: jira.create_link for preemptive upstream task uses type: "Related" to TC-8020. Lines 322-325: preemptive downstream task also uses type: "Related" to TC-8020. cross-stream.md line 40: "Link type: 'Related' (not 'Depend') to the originating CVE Jira TC-8020".

assertion_results.text: Preemptive task descriptions include a preemptive remediation prefix noting TC-8020 (stream rhtpa-2.2) as the originating CVE
assertion_results.evidence: remediation.md lines 178-181: "**Preemptive remediation**: This task was created proactively from cross-stream impact analysis of TC-8020 (stream rhtpa-2.2). No stream-specific CVE Jira exists yet for this stream." Lines 257-260: identical prefix for downstream preemptive task.
